message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 9 goals for the model.

Iteration 1 — setting up the full participant structure (pools/lanes) first: Building Authority as the expanded main process with lanes for roles; Citizen and Environmental Agency as collapsed external participants for message exchanges.

Modeling the full end-to-end process inside the Building Authority pool, with message exchanges to the collapsed Citizen and Environmental Agency pools (submission, missing-docs request/resubmission, forward for review, opinion, final decision notification).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 10 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…
I’ll fix the critical message-flow semantics around the citizen resubmission and clarify the agency send/wait naming so the collapsed-pool communications are consistent and unambiguous.

Fixing the invalid collapsed-pool message flow: the citizen (collapsed pool) must connect directly to a message catch event in the Building Authority, not to a non-message endpoint misuse. I’ll correct the message flow so PoolCitizen remains the endpoint on the citizen side, and the receiving endpoint is the existing message catch event inside the authority.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…

To resolve the critical issue, I’ll stop using the collapsed Citizen pool as an explicit sender of the internal 'Missing docs received' catch event by expanding the Citizen pool and adding a concrete send step for resubmission.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

Iteration 1 (structure fix): I’m aligning the collaboration semantics with Goals 1–3 by making Citizen a collapsed/blackbox pool (no internal elements) and ensuring message flows connect to/from collapsed pool boundaries (not from internal Citizen tasks/events). I’m also making the Environmental Agency message flow consistently connect to the collapsed pool boundary.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 12 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 2 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
